LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS MIWANDA BARNES AND ALLISON CAMILLE'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE FINAL APPROVAL HEARING WILL BE HELD ON OCTOBER 28, 2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT.
